info.name: SimpleInvoice - 101Digital (Dev)
info.description:
101 Digital Web Engineer Assessment (ReactJS v2.2.4) - SimpleInvoice API flow.

Run the requests top to bottom:
1. Fetch App Access Token  -> saves {{accessToken}}
2. Get User Profile         -> saves {{orgToken}} (memberships[0].token)
3. Fetch Invoices           -> list / search / sort / filter / paginate
4. Create Invoice           -> submits a single-line-item invoice

Tokens are extracted automatically by the test scripts, so you do not need to copy/paste them. Just hit Send in order.

request.description: OAuth2 password grant against the identity server. Returns access_token used as Bearer token for all subsequent calls.

exec: var data = json && json.data ? json.data : json;

request.description: Returns the logged-in user profile. The org-token is read from memberships[0].token and saved to {{orgToken}}.

item.name: 3. Fetch Invoices (list / search / sort / filter / paginate)

request.description: Lists invoices. Enable the disabled query params (keyword/status/fromDate/toDate) to test search and filtering.

exec: // Generate a unique invoice number / reference each run to avoid duplicates

request.description: Creates a single invoice with one line item. invoiceNumber/invoiceReference are auto-generated unique values in the pre-request script so re-running won't collide.
